title: Insights
description: An observation the clinic/interpreter's daily digest surfaces from the user's own data — a rolling trend, a plausible correlation, or an anomaly. Framed as observations to discuss with a clinician, never as diagnoses. Not medical advice.

body.description: the observation in plain language, e.g. 'resting HR is up ~8% over 3 weeks'

metricKind.description: the metric kind this insight is about, if any (e.g. 'resting_hr')
